text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 41 

MC_PLAN_SAREA_CD 

LABEL: Managed Care Plan Service Area Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: Identifies the geographic unit under which the managed care entity is under contract to provide 
services; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_SAREA_CD 

LONG NAME: MC_PLAN_SAREA_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF
